productDisplayName: Playboy Men Casual Grey Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the cool and casual thinkers, this leather shoe from playboy oozes confidence, style and comfort. Slip into these hi-ankle shoes and seize the day with much ease, while the stylish design enhances your fashion statement. Upper Leather upper with a smooth finish and supple feel for all-day comfort High ankle for extra support to the upper ankle and style PU foxing on the forefoot for enhanced protection and durability Lace-ups through punched eyelets for a snug Fit Leather overlay at the back collar for easy wearing of the shoe, durability and style Midsole Mildly padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Diamond shaped lugs for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
